<?php /** * libphonenumber-for-php-lite data file * This file has been @generated from libphonenumber data * Do not modify! * @internal */ return [ 'id' => '', 'countryCode' => 506, 'internationalPrefix' => '', 'sameMobileAndFixedLinePattern' => false, 'numberFormat' => [ [ 'pattern' => '(\\d{4})(\\d{2})(\\d{2})', 'format' => '$1 $2 $3', 'leadingDigitsPatterns' => [], 'nationalPrefixFormattingRule' => '', 'domesticCarrierCodeFormattingRule' => '', 'nationalPrefixOptionalWhenFormatting' => false, ], ], 'intlNumberFormat' => [], 'mainCountryForCode' => false, 'mobileNumberPortableRegion' => false, ];
